comment: Drives the GitHub Pages deploy (.github/workflows/pages.yml assembles the artifact from this file; nothing else decides what gets published). Each entry maps a repo input to a site output path rooted at https://wow-look-at-my.github.io/scratch_ui/. {from, to}: copy a file or directory (recursive) into the artifact at 'to'. {redirect, to}: generate a meta-refresh stub at 'to' pointing at 'redirect'. Components + tokens are published at the site ROOT — the pre-restructure layout external consumers embed, mirroring the js-snippets root-relative URL convention — and also under /components so the demo's relative ../components/ references resolve; the redirect stubs keep legacy deep links to the spec pages working.
